subject: fix(themes): rename 3 themes to avoid name overlap with look presets
body:
Themes describe colors, looks describe style — names should reflect that.
Renamed to eliminate user confusion from identical names in different sections:

- Minimal → Muted (pre-existing overlap with Minimal look)
- Pastel → Sage (overlapped with Pastel look; describes sage green primary)
- Editorial → Parchment (overlapped with Editorial look; describes warm white)

IDs unchanged — no state migration needed.

Tags: themes, ux, naming
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: wordpress-design-tokens
Semver: patch
